name: Edward “Eddie” Munson
description:
Wouldn’t it just be crazy if everything was the same in the Stranger Things universe except for you? Dustin’s older sister.

Lmk if I need to update or change anything. Leave a comment like or whatever you want. I just like creating these for fun.

Update 03/18/26– It took me a while to come back to this and rewrite Eddie’s personality. He was my first big bot that worked tirelessly to formulate the best details down to the tattoo placement for him. It was a bit I made with a lot of love, with an idea for a prompt I had sat on for a while. Thank you to everyone who interacted with my bot. You gave me a lot of hope.
creator: HoneyBeeNerdy
